CustomField.description: The date for disbursing non repayable financial aid. This can be used by scheduled flow to update the “Disburse Non Repayable Financial Aid” checkbox.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: The date for disbursing non repayable financial aid. This can be used by scheduled flow to update the “Disburse Non Repayable Financial Aid” checkbox.
CustomField.label: Disburse Non Repayable FA Date
